name: Time and Him are Just Right
overview: The stubborn, adorable Lin Xi approaches the crafty top student Ji Jun Xing on purpose. Throughout their "opportunistic" friendship, feelings bloom between the two as they are always there for each other. Not only do they make friends, but they also make their own dreams and goals come true in the end.

trailers.title: 预告：定档1225！元气少女爱上腹黑暖男【时光与他，恰是正好】
